positive: A detailed, abstract representation of interconnected planetary orbits and celestial structures, forming a majestic, minimalist constellation design. The main subject is a stylized, glowing nebula emanating from a central point, surrounded by crisp, thin-line planetary rings and dots. Style should be a blend of modern celestial cartography and Art Deco etching, using highly contrasting colors of deep midnight blue, ethereal turquoise, and gold leaf accents. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, optimized for circular or square apparel prints. Focus on clean silhouettes and strong radial symmetry. Volumetric lighting emphasizing depth and clean edges. Highly printable vector aesthetic, clean lines, high contrast, sticker-quality print detail.
negative: blur, grainy, watercolor, low saturation, monochrome, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, artifact, dirty, rough edges, messy, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, noise
